button.class: nav-link fw-bold py-3 text-start mb-1 text-info

div.class: bg-info text-white rounded-circle d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center me-3 shadow-sm

section.p: This module modifies the standard Odoo HR framework (hr.employee), injecting academic-specific capabilities into employee profiles. The system allows you to manage Lecturers, PMB Staff, and Academic Staff (TU) with a data hierarchy fully integrated into other academic modules.

div.p: The employee profile form interface changes automatically based on their job role. Lecturers get the NIDN field, while PMB Staff and Academic Staff get different jurisdiction fields.
Employees with Lecturer status can be linked directly with students as Academic Advisors (PA). This relation triggers their authority to approve KRS.
Operational access rights (PMB, KRS, KHS) are restricted only to specific Faculty or Study Program levels directly from the employee profile (Jurisdiction).

div.class: mb-4 ps-4 border-start border-4 border-secondary position-relative
div.p: HR Admin creates the campus organizational structure.
div.div: Action: Admin selects the role from the Academic Role dropdown (Lecturer / PMB Staff / Academic Staff) on the Job form. The system will use this parameter as a logic indicator in the next steps.

div.class: mb-4 ps-4 border-start border-4 border-info position-relative
div.p: Staff enters new employee data into the system.
div.div: UI Automation: When staff selects a job position that has the "Lecturer" role, the academic profile *Tab* will appear. If the job role is "PMB Staff" or "Academic Staff", the relevant jurisdiction *Tab* will appear. This form is highly dynamic!
Action: Staff fills in the biodata, uploads photos, and determines the department/faculty the employee belongs to.

div.class: mb-4 ps-4 border-start border-4 border-warning position-relative
div.p: Defines the working territory limits of Registration Staff (PMB) or Academic Staff (TU).
div.div: Strict Security: Without a clear jurisdiction, faculty-level staff risk viewing/modifying confidential data of other faculties.

Action: Open the *tab* PMB/Academic Jurisdiction on the employee profile, then select the Faculty or Study Program that is within their work scope. Odoo will lock data access according to those territory limits.
